MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2015 Continued To Nov-30-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-29-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS GROUPO RISTORANTE ITALIANO, INC., A CORPORATION, LORENZO LOGORECI AKA LORENZO ALLEGRO, and ALLEGRO ROMANO, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication - The motion for summary judgment is denied. There is a triable issue of material fact regarding whether Mr. Lorenzo executed the 2012 contract on behalf of defendants. (Lorenzo Dec., par. 5; Yip Dec., par. 12). The court overrules defendant's objection based upon D'Amico v. Bd. of Medical Examiners (1974) 11 Cal.3d 1, 21. That case is inapposite. Mr.Yip is not contradicting his deposition testimony or a prior admission and any confusion regarding the timing of the contracts goes to the weight of his testimony. The court does not entertain the lack of consideration argument because defendant raised it for the first time in the reply brief. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg
